creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text:
(In reply to Bryan Drewery from comment #1)
> I would expect this if poudriere-devel created a jail and then poudriere 3.3 were used on the jail. Did that happen?

This could have happened. To be sure, with poudriere-3.3.6, I deleted all jails and recreated them from scratch, and after that I cannot reproduce the problem.
